holdings.infoBox: VTWG is an equity ETF with a total of 1138 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 3.41%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 2.09%, Slbbh1142 at 1.71%, Sterling Infrastructure at 1.41%, and Fabrinet at 1.29%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Russell 2000 Growth ETF (VTWG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 Growth index. The fund is passively managed to invest in US small-cap growth stocks. Holdings are selected and weighted based on EPS growth estimates and historical sales growth. VTWG was launched on Sep 20, 2010 and is issued by Vanguard.
